title: EXTRASTAR Head Torch Rechargeable, Headlight with 3 Lights 4 Modes, LED Head Torch Headlamp for Camping, Fishing, Hiking, Jogging, Running, Cycling
features: 【Multiple Modes】: The headlight has 4 modes, the maximum can reach 1500 lumens (please note that the lumens of different modes are different, and the duration of use is also different).
【Please Note】: The product can gradually prevent dust and splashing water, do not soak in water, so as not to affect the service life of the product.
【Wide Use】: LED headlights are perfect for jogging, cycling, camping, fishing, adventure, and other long night activities.
【Comfortable and Lightweight】: The LED headlight can be adjusted according to the comfort you need, perfect for indoor and outdoor use.
【After-sales Service】: If you have any questions, just feel free to contact us at any time, we will try our best to solve your problems.
description: Product Description Product Specifications Max Lumen 1500LM Multiple Modes 3 Lights 4 Modes Waterproof Level IP44 Applicable Scene Jogging, Cycling, Camping, Fishing, Adventure and more Safety Warning Light There is a red warning light on the back of this headlamp, which can also be seen by people behind you when you wear it for various activities, providing you with a certain degree of safety. IP44 Waterproof The product can gradually prevent dust and splashing water, do not soak in water, so as not to affect the service life of the product. Flexible Adjustment The LED headlight can be adjusted according to the comfort you need, perfect for indoor and outdoor use. Wide Application
